recommendations.title: The Kid
recommendations.overview: Two youths, Niño and Compi, enter the world of drug smuggling in the Strait of Gibraltar; while two police officers, Jesús and Eva, try to eradicate the contraband.

recommendations.title: Cell 211
recommendations.overview: The story of two men on different sides of a prison riot -- the inmate leading the rebellion and the young guard trapped in the revolt, who poses as a prisoner in a desperate attempt to survive the ordeal.

recommendations.title: Outlaws
recommendations.overview: Introverted Girona student Nacho meets two delinquents from the city's Chinatown and gets caught up in a summer onslaught of burglaries and hold ups that will change his life.

recommendations.title: Yucatán
recommendations.overview: Two white collar thieves compete fiercely against the other trying to steal to an old baker the millions he won on the lotto.

recommendations.title: More American Graffiti
recommendations.overview: College graduates deal with Vietnam and other issues of the late '60s.

recommendations.title: Tenet
recommendations.overview: Armed with only one word - Tenet - and fighting for the survival of the entire world, the Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: They Live
recommendations.overview: A lone drifter stumbles upon a unique pair of sunglasses that reveal aliens are systematically gaining control of the Earth by masquerading as humans and lulling the public into submission.

recommendations.title: A Writer's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: Lu Kongwen is the author of a fantasy novel series following a heroic teenager, also named Kongwen, on a quest to end the tyrannical rule of Lord Redmane, under the guidance of a Black Armor. But through a strange twist of fate, the fantasy world of

recommendations.title: Mishima: A Life in Four Chapters
recommendations.overview: A fictional account of the life of Japanese author Yukio Mishima, combining dramatizations of three of his novels and a depiction of the events of November 25th, 1970.
